sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110874" key="filaristei/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλ-ᾰριστείδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n110874.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">admirer of Aristides,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.315</biblScope> </bibl> (Thom.Schol.).</sense> </entryFree>
